data.title: McLean & Company releases guide on measuring quality of hire, aiding HR leaders in maximizing recruiting investments.
data.description: A recent publication from the renowned HR research and advisory firm, McLean & Company, introduces the Guide to Measuring Quality of Hire amidst a pressing need for HR leaders to optimize recruitment investments and showcase the importance of talent selection in business success. This comprehensive research piece offers invaluable insights for organizations facing increasing challenges in maximizing the efficiency of their hiring processes. The guide provides practical strategies and methodologies for assessing the quality of hires, aiding HR professionals in making informed decisions to drive long-term business growth. With the current competitive landscape, where each hire plays a critical role, this guide equips organizations with the tools to measure and enhance the effectiveness of their talent acquisition efforts, ensuring a more strategic and impactful recruitment process.

data.title: Connected Nation trained 2,200 people during Digital Inclusion Week 2025 with 62 workshops nationwide.
data.description: In Bowling Green, Kentucky on October 16, 2025, Connected Nation (CN) marked Digital Inclusion Week 2025 and Cybersecurity Awareness Month by organizing 62 workshops nationwide. These workshops were held in various states and territories, where over 2,200 individuals received training in digital technology and cybersecurity.

data.title: ImageTrend, LLC appoints new Medical Advisory Board comprised of physicians and EMS medical directors to provide guidance.
data.description: The new Medical Advisory Board of ImageTrend, LLC was recently unveiled in Eagan, Minnesota, on October 15, 2025. Comprising physicians and Emergency Medical Services (EMS) medical directors, this board has been formed to offer valuable guidance and advice to the company. ImageTrend, LLC will benefit from the expertise and insights of these board members in enhancing their solutions and services.

data.title: Yosi Health named finalist in Fierce Innovation Awards: Healthcare Edition 2025 in Operational Solutions category.
data.description: Yosi Health, a company specializing in digital front door automation solutions, has recently been selected as a finalist in the Operational Solutions category of the prestigious Fierce Innovation Awards. The announcement was made in New York on October 16, 2025. Yosi's AI-powered platform aims to streamline services and enhance operational efficiency. This recognition underscores the company's dedication to innovation in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Interlink Electronics (Nasdaq: LINK) to present at LD Micro Main Event XIX on Oct. 19-21, 2025, in San Diego.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, Interlink Electronics, Inc. (Nasdaq: LINK) disclosed its involvement in the LD Micro Main Event XIX occurring from October 19-21, 2025, at the Hotel del Coronado in San Diego, California. Interlink, a renowned player in sensor technology and printed electronic solutions, will be partaking in this event.
